---
title: "UseR 2025"
categories: [FCC, package, S3, DuckDB]
author: "Olivier Leroy"
date: "2025-08-09"
---

I was fortunate to present at the [UseR Conference](https://user2025.r-project.org/) (Raleigh, North Carolina). It was a great and fun conference so I would like to thanks all the organizers, sponsors and participants to make it that way! 

My talks focus on why you should wrap [DuckDB](https://duckdb.org/) and [S3](https://aws.amazon.com/s3/) in a R package. I think it provides an unique way to curate, organize and simplify access to data that otherwise would be more difficult to obtain. 

So far I have not see use case of this workflow and I think the benefits to implement it greatly out balance the slight cost of setting it up. Leveraging the R package ecosystem significantly enhances the experience of building and using it.   

My presentation is available [HERE](https://defuneste.codeberg.page/useR_2025/)!
